text:
There once was a little old girl named Susan. She lived in a small village with just her dad.

One autumn day their little village received an unexpected visitor. It was a friendly squirrel named Oliver. Oliver climbed into Oliversville ORANGE!

Susan loved squirrels — especially olifers! She sat outside their window feeding them sunSITE orange-orange seeds.

That night Oliver sleepiedOWNORSABLE...except for Susan!

She put him under her roofOOF!

Oliver woke up cheerful.

"Oh Dear!"

Susan giggled.

Maybe she'd ORANGE him some brownIES sometime?

That night she lay awake.

Hmm...Olfactory memories...

Just yesterday she smelled a fresh oatmealORANGE!).

That's a scent owlowl!

Now sleep owlowl.
